completed_tasks.name: Schema migration — TitleStyleProps x/y/borderRadius, remove subtitle
TitleOverlay rendering — pixel positioning, config borderRadius, subtitle removed
TitleEditor UI — x/y inputs, borderRadius slider, subtitle controls removed
Renderer sync + UAT + post-UAT fixes (stale fields BUG-1, GET/PUT divergence BUG-2)

decisions.decision: BUG-2 FIXED: resolveConfigPath() now uses ACTIVE_PIPELINE_CONFIG_PATH as fallback for GET
decisions.rationale: GET was reading services/remotion-studio/pipeline-config.json (local fallback) while PUT wrote to pipeline/pipeline-config.json. Changes were lost on reload. Previous HANDOFF noted this as 'pre-existing, not a Phase 20 bug' — UAT proved it was user-impacting and fixed it.

decisions.decision: BUG-1 FIXED: handleStartEdit now does explicit TitleStyleProps field pick
decisions.rationale: Spread of { ...title.style } re-saved deprecated fields (subtitleFontSize, subtitleColor, topOffset) on each edit. Previous HANDOFF noted this as 'expected behavior'. UAT showed it pollutes the config on round-trip.

decisions.decision: Local pipeline-config.json files cleaned of pre-Phase-20 stale fields
decisions.rationale: Both services/remotion-studio/pipeline-config.json and pipeline/pipeline-config.json had subtitleFontSize, topOffset, subtitleColor, subtitleFontFamily. Removed. Next phase starts from clean config.

next_action: Phase 20 fully complete with post-UAT fixes. Plan Phase 21 (PNG overlays): /gsd-plan-phase 21
context_notes: Two full UAT passes done with playwright. 5/5 tests passed both times. Three bugs found and fixed. Studio server on port 3123 still running. Milestone v1.3 at 95% (18/19 phases). Phase 21 is the final planned phase of v1.3.

session_notes.summary: Studio profiles hardening + export/import + ops. Not a GSD phase — ad-hoc work driven directly by the user (one quick task included).
work: Position control 2-col layout (TitleEditor/OverlayEditor): preset grid left, X/Y inline-stacked 'Y :'/'X :' (Y over X). Commit 73b9927.

Profiles F5-persistence bug: saving a profile / applying now writes the active pipeline config + a persisted active-profile pointer (profiles/.active-profile); GET /api/profiles returns activeSlug. Trigger shows 'Estilo: <name> · Modificado' (sketch 034-A), hydrated from server. Mini-specimens per dropdown row (server preview). Commit 785e063.

Profile JSON export/import (GSD quick task 260605-pa2): per-row export downloads the ProfileFile envelope as {slug}.json; Importar file-picker validates (JSON->name->validatePipelineConfig) and POSTs. Commits 8e861a5, ecb83d5, e9534d7.

Profile fixes the user flagged ('no funciona'): (1) export was stale — PUT /api/config now re-snapshots the active profile so 'Guardar config' edits land in the exported JSON; (2) import now calls onApplied so it applies to the editor immediately (not only on F5); (3) Modificado clears after save (savedVersion prop + activeConfig refetch). Commit f4a1ccb.
Ops: cloudflared forced to HTTP/2 (TUNNEL_TRANSPORT_PROTOCOL=http2) to stop QUIC/UDP tunnel flapping. Commit 20be3c4. Monitored ~3.5 min: 0 flap errors, 4/4 http2 conns, prod 200 throughout.
session_notes.verification: playwright-cli (firefox) E2E: 21/21 flow checks green (create, modify->save->export-reflects-edits, second profile, switch, import-applies, export envelope, delete-clears-active) + export->import round-trip identical. 448 unit tests + 5 new regression tests. Production https://reel-factory.luishelguera.dev verified live (401 no-auth / 200 with .env creds) running the pushed code.
gotchas: Studio is a Docker container (reel-factory-remotion-studio-1) that bakes the editor dist at image build time — editor changes need 'docker compose build remotion-studio' + recreate, NOT the host 'npx tsx' command (can't bind :3123, exit 144).

playwright-cli + Firefox: basic-auth creds embedded in the URL break ALL SPA fetch() calls ('url with embedded credentials'). For E2E, temporarily disable auth via shell-env override (STUDIO_BASIC_AUTH_USER='' ... docker compose up -d --force-recreate), then restore with a plain recreate. Use CSS/text selectors not eNN refs (refs renumber per render).
During E2E auth was temporarily disabled (prod briefly unauthenticated). RESTORED at end — auth back on (401), test profiles cleaned, user's real 'general' profile intact.
session_notes.state_at_handoff: All work committed and pushed; master == origin/main at f1f7151. Working tree clean. Production online over stable HTTP/2 tunnel, auth enabled. No playwright sessions open. Note: this HANDOFF's top-level phase/decisions block is stale (Phase 20) and was not regenerated — only this session_notes entry reflects 2026-06-05/06 work.
